The '''''Starduster''''' was [[Nera Dantels]]' personal [[Starship/Legends|starship]], which assisted the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] on numerous missions.<ref name="XWRS½" />

==History==
It was the ship that smuggled the first [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droids]] for use on Rebel [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]].<ref name="SWE:D" />

The ship was later used to ship Dantels, [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], and [[Jorin Sol]] to [[Jabiim/Legends|Jabiim]] to take part in a diplomatic mission. Unfortunately, the Jabiimi took the diplomats prisoner due to the fact that Luke's [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|father]] had betrayed the Jabiimi years earlier. The ''Starduster'' was impounded along with [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] and [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]].<ref name="sw:e29">[[Empire 29|''Empire'' 29]]</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
A ship that appears briefly in ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron: The Phantom Affair]]'' looks very much like the ''Starduster''.
